Budget.Name: Seasonal free-roam routes
Budget.Description: Routes used for seasonal set dressing for free-roam. Counts towards free-roam memory usage

Budget.Name: Seasonal set dressing race routes
Budget.Description: Routes used for seasonal set dressing for races, get the full free-roam budget: 75MB

Budget.Name: Story start paraphernalia
Budget.Description: Loaded in conjuction with free-roam routes. Counts towards free-roam memory usage.

Budget.Name: See it Drive it paraphernalia
Budget.Description: Loaded in conjuction with free-roam routes. Counts towards free-roam memory usage.

Budget.Name: Eliminator bonus board route
Budget.Description: Loaded in conjunction with free-roam routes when in Eliminator.

Budget.Name: Playerhome Routes (External Walls)
Budget.Description: Routes reserved for Playerhomes external walls

Budget.Name: Homespace Routes
Budget.Description: Routes reserved for Barnfinds and Autoshow

Budget.Name: Event Loading Area Routes
Budget.Description: Route reserved for paddock and gas station loading spaces

Budget.Name: Barnfind Interior Routes
Budget.Description: Routes reserved for Barnfind Interiors, assumes traffic memory

Budget.Name: Permanently loaded routes
Budget.Description: Any route in this range is always loaded. Not all of this budget is actually used.

UserOffset.Name: BrioEstateEventLabOffset
UserOffset.Description: Amount of Memory we take from the track super optional system when building in the Estate

UserOffset.Name: FirstPreviewEventLabOffset
UserOffset.Description: Amount of Memory we take from the track super optional system when previewing the first prop to place on EventLab
